title: Petrol, diesel, and domestic LPG supply in the State remains normal, says Haryana Civil Supplies Minister
summary: “Hundreds of thousands of cylinders were being distributed daily across the State through a network of over 5,000 distributors,” says Minister

title: Debut in politics, Nishant Kumar remains busy with party activities
summary: Junior Mr. Kumar who is likely to become one of the new Deputy Chief Ministers of the State is visiting Temples, Gurudwara, Mazar and various other locations to pay homage to eminent leaders to seek their blessings after joining the party

title: Bhopal gas tragedy: Madhya Pradesh HC asks government to share clean-up plan
summary: In an action taken report, the government told the court that a meeting chaired by Additional Chief Secretary Ashok Barnwal was held on March 3 to discuss a time-bound remediation of the Union Carbide India Ltd. (UCIL) factory

title: Rahul Gandhi pays tribute to Kanshi Ram ahead of birth anniversary, vows to fight for marginalised
summary: “Today we remember Kanshi Ram ji’s struggle, his vision, and his influence on Indian politics. I thank him wholeheartedly. We pledge to follow his path and fight for the issues of marginalised sections. If the Congress had functioned effectively at that time, Kanshi Ram would not have needed to wage a separate struggle,” Rahul Gandhi

title: Attack on Manipur woman: NHRC issues notice to Delhi Police
summary: Police apprehended four minors for the attack, in which she suffered injuries to her face, and for hurling racial and sexual slurs at her

title: 11 Indian nationals charged in U.S. over visa fraud scheme
summary: The charge of conspiracy to commit visa fraud provides for a sentence of up to five years in prison, three years of supervised release and a fine of $250,000

title: Pi Day 2026: significance of the mathematical constant π
summary: March 14 is celebrated globally as Pi Day as the first digits of the mathematical constant π, 3.14159, match the date 3/14

title: The curious case of SCR’s twin stations
summary: From Lallaguda to Ammuguda, South Central Railway hosts rare “twin stations” sharing identical names yet serving different roles and routes. While some function purely as operational signalling points, others handle passengers, creating unique railway geography and occasional commuter confusion
